title: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 Interop Fixture
description: Source-of-truth fixture file under interop/fixtures/<impl>/<id>.fixture.json. Each fixture declares the implementation that produced it, the artifact class, the published vector(s) it aligns with, and the artifact bytes themselves. The fixture_id MUST equal the filename stem; this is enforced by interop/scripts/generate_fixture_manifest.py in addition to this schema.
